AcceptAdministratorInvitation.description: Grants permission to accept invitations to become a GuardDuty member account

AcceptInvitation.description: Grants permission to accept invitations to become a GuardDuty member account

ArchiveFindings.description: Grants permission to archive GuardDuty findings

CreateDetector.description: Grants permission to create a detector

CreateFilter.description: Grants permission to create GuardDuty filters. A filters defines finding attributes and conditions used to filter findings

CreateIPSet.description: Grants permission to create an IPSet

CreateMalwareProtectionPlan.description: Grants permission to create a new Malware Protection plan

CreateMembers.description: Grants permission to create GuardDuty member accounts, where the account used to create a member becomes the GuardDuty administrator account

CreatePublishingDestination.description: Grants permission to create a publishing destination

CreateSampleFindings.description: Grants permission to create sample findings

CreateThreatEntitySet.description: Grants permission to create GuardDuty ThreatEntitySets, where a ThreatEntitySet consists of known malicious IP addresses and/or domains used by GuardDuty to generate findings

CreateThreatIntelSet.description: Grants permission to create GuardDuty ThreatIntelSets, where a ThreatIntelSet consists of known malicious IP addresses used by GuardDuty to generate findings

CreateTrustedEntitySet.description: Grants permission to create a TrustedEntitySet

DeclineInvitations.description: Grants permission to decline invitations to become a GuardDuty member account

DeleteDetector.description: Grants permission to delete GuardDuty detectors

DeleteFilter.description: Grants permission to delete GuardDuty filters

DeleteIPSet.description: Grants permission to delete GuardDuty IPSets

DeleteInvitations.description: Grants permission to delete invitations to become a GuardDuty member account

DeleteMalwareProtectionPlan.description: Grants permission to delete a Malware Protection plan

DeleteMembers.description: Grants permission to delete GuardDuty member accounts

DeletePublishingDestination.description: Grants permission to delete a publishing destination

DeleteThreatEntitySet.description: Grants permission to delete GuardDuty ThreatEntitySets

DeleteThreatIntelSet.description: Grants permission to delete GuardDuty ThreatIntelSets

DeleteTrustedEntitySet.description: Grants permission to delete GuardDuty TrustedEntitySets

DescribeMalwareScans.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about malware scans

DescribeOrganizationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about the delegated administrator associated with a GuardDuty detector

DescribePublishingDestination.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about a publishing destination

DisableOrganizationAdminAccount.description: Grants permission to disable the organization delegated administrator for GuardDuty

DisassociateFromAdministratorAccount.description: Grants permission to disassociate a GuardDuty member account from its GuardDuty administrator account

DisassociateFromMasterAccount.description: Grants permission to disassociate a GuardDuty member account from its GuardDuty administrator account

DisassociateMembers.description: Grants permission to disassociate GuardDuty member accounts from their administrator GuardDuty account

EnableOrganizationAdminAccount.description: Grants permission to enable an organization delegated administrator for GuardDuty

GetAdministratorAccount.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of the GuardDuty administrator account associated with a member account

GetCoverageStatistics.description: Grants permission to list Amazon GuardDuty coverage statistics for the specified GuardDuty account in a Region

GetDetector.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty detectors

GetFilter.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty filters

GetFindings.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty findings

GetFindingsStatistics.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty finding statistics

GetIPSet.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty IPSets

GetInvitationsCount.description: Grants permission to retrieve the count of all GuardDuty invitations sent to a specified account, which does not include the accepted invitation

GetMalwareProtectionPlan.description: Grants permission to retrieve a Malware Protection plan details

GetMalwareScan.description: Grants permission to retrieve a malware scan's details

GetMalwareScanSettings.description: Grants permission to retrieve the malware scan settings

GetMasterAccount.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of the GuardDuty administrator account associated with a member account

GetMemberDetectors.description: Grants permission to describe which data sources are enabled for member accounts detectors

GetMembers.description: Grants permission to retrieve the member accounts associated with an administrator account

GetOrganizationStatistics.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty protection plan coverage statistics for member accounts in a Region

GetRemainingFreeTrialDays.description: Grants permission to provide the number of days left for each data source used in the free trial period

GetThreatEntitySet.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty ThreatEntitySets

GetThreatIntelSet.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty ThreatIntelSets

GetTrustedEntitySet.description: Grants permission to retrieve GuardDuty TrustedEntitySets

GetUsageStatistics.description: Grants permission to list Amazon GuardDuty usage statistics over the last 30 days for the specified detector ID

InviteMembers.description: Grants permission to invite other AWS accounts to enable GuardDuty and become GuardDuty member accounts

ListCoverage.description: Grants permission to list all the resource details for a given account in a Region

ListDetectors.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty detectors

ListFilters.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty filters

ListFindings.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty findings

ListIPSets.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty IPSets

ListInvitations.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of all of the GuardDuty membership invitations that were sent to an AWS account

ListMalwareProtectionPlans.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of Malware Protection plans

ListMalwareScans.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of malware scans

ListMembers.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty member accounts associated with an administrator account

ListOrganizationAdminAccounts.description: Grants permission to list details about the organization delegated administrator for GuardDuty

ListPublishingDestinations.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of publishing destinations

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of tags associated with a GuardDuty resource

ListThreatEntitySets.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty ThreatEntitySets

ListThreatIntelSets.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty ThreatIntelSets

ListTrustedEntitySets.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of GuardDuty TrustedEntitySets

SendObjectMalwareScan.description: Grants permission to initiate a new object malware scan

SendSecurityTelemetry.description: Grants permission to send security telemetry for a specific GuardDuty account in a Region

StartMalwareScan.description: Grants permission to initiate a new malware scan

StartMonitoringMembers.description: Grants permission to a GuardDuty administrator account to monitor findings from GuardDuty member accounts

StopMonitoringMembers.description: Grants permission to disable monitoring findings from member accounts

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a GuardDuty resource

UnarchiveFindings.description: Grants permission to unarchive GuardDuty findings

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a GuardDuty resource

UpdateDetector.description: Grants permission to update GuardDuty detectors

UpdateFilter.description: Grants permission to updates GuardDuty filters

UpdateFindingsFeedback.description: Grants permission to update findings feedback to mark GuardDuty findings as useful or not useful

UpdateIPSet.description: Grants permission to update GuardDuty IPSets

UpdateMalwareProtectionPlan.description: Grants permission to update the Malware Protection plan

UpdateMalwareScanSettings.description: Grants permission to update the malware scan settings

UpdateMemberDetectors.description: Grants permission to update which data sources are enabled for member accounts detectors

UpdateOrganizationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to update the delegated administrator configuration associated with a GuardDuty detector

UpdatePublishingDestination.description: Grants permission to update a publishing destination

UpdateThreatEntitySet.description: Grants permission to update GuardDuty ThreatEntitySets

UpdateThreatIntelSet.description: Grants permission to updates the GuardDuty ThreatIntelSets

UpdateTrustedEntitySet.description: Grants permission to update GuardDuty TrustedEntitySets

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys in the request
